top.title: Iran condemns US strikes as 'gross violation' of ceasefire
top.summary: The attacks took place while Iranian and Qatari negotiators were in Doha for peace talks.

top.title: Four killed as school minibus collides with train in Belgium
top.summary: Two schoolchildren, their chaperone and the minibus driver were killed in the crash, says a Belgian minister.

top.title: Eleven killed in Lebanon village as Israel intensifies strikes
top.summary: Israel says it struck 100 Hezbollah infrastructure sites and fighters in Lebanon, after PM Benjamin Netanyahu vows to "crush" Hezbollah.

top.title: The rise of the fruit that tastes like custard
top.summary: Custard apple plants are prized for their hardiness but exporting their delicate fruit is difficult.

top.title: AI may speed up search for drugs to treat brain conditions
top.summary: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.
